version_description: Designed for beginners. Keep pinky finger down during G, Em7 and Cadd9 to smooth the sound.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Em7 D/F3[/tab]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I don't want another pretty face[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I don't want just anyone to hold[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
I don't want my love to go to waste[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I want you and your beautiful soul[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
I  know that you are something special[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
To you I'd be always faithful[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I  want to be what you always needed[/tab]

Then I hope you'll see the heart in me[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
But I'm just fine moving forward[/tab]

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
